findings.description: The source contains a complete major section 「プロパティ名の一覧を簡易的に取得する手順」 (underlined with `====`, the same heading level as the コンストラクタ (s4) and setter/getter (s5) sections). It includes a 4-step procedure with example replacement strings. This section has no corresponding index entry; its content is summarised in a single sentence appended to s5. Given that peer sections at the same heading level (s4, s5) each received their own knowledge section, this section should also have its own entry (e.g., s6).
